pr_text:
## Title: Fix missing return statements in gNB initialization functions

### Summary
The `get_options()` function in the gNB softmodem was declared with a non-void return type but lacked return statements, causing undefined behavior and preventing proper error propagation from command-line parsing. Additionally, `create_gNB_tasks()` had a missing return statement on an error path when X2AP task creation fails in NSA mode. These issues could lead to silent failures during gNB initialization and i
